/home/runner/work/Huginn/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/perft/fast_perft_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/bitboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/bitboard_movegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/bitboard_position.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/bitboard_movegen_pure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/bitboard_perft_optimized.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/bitboard_attacks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/position.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/zobrist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/movegen_enhanced.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/attack_detection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/attack_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/pawn_movegen_bb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/pawn_movegen_native_bb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/move.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/board120.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/chess_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/evaluation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/input_checking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/minimal_search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/pvtable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/polyglot_book.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/knight_lookup_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/king_lookup_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/pawn_lookup_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/syzygy_tablebase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fast_perft_test.dir/src/epd_parser.cpp.o -o bin/fast_perft_test
